examples: Pulling the door open, Sophia saw Edwin, as nervous as a little kid.
Early the following morning, Sophia woke up only to find Edwin missing and also noticed a note under a glass of hot milk, on which were written too many words.
I'm Edwin. I'll show you to your hotel.
In 1929 Edwin Hubble discovered that the Universe is expanding, which led to the Big Bang theory.
Ms Edwin says that the new index will not be ready until early 2014.
